## Tool Name
<!-- e.g., Weights & Biases, Habitat, etc. -->


## GitHub Repo / Website
<!-- Link to the tool's repo or homepage -->


## Category
<!-- Which stage of the robotics ML pipeline does it belong to? -->
- [ ] Capture (data collection, annotation)
- [ ] Train (model training, experiment tracking)
- [ ] Simulate (physics simulation, digital twins)
- [ ] Deploy (inference, edge deployment)
- [ ] Infra (runtime dependencies, containers)

## Install Method
<!-- How is it typically installed? -->
- [ ] pip install
- [ ] npm install
- [ ] brew / apt
- [ ] Docker
- [ ] Other: <!-- specify -->

## Why should we add it?
<!-- Brief explanation of why this tool is useful for robotics ML engineers -->
